---
title: "Computational Analysis of Global Conflict"
subtitle: "A Replication Study"
categories: ["Latent Dirichlet Allocation"]
date: "2026-02-14"
image: "../images/replication_screenshot.png"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<iframe src="../sample_replication.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;">
  This browser does not support PDFs. Please download the PDF to view it.
</iframe>
